title: LastPass confirms data breach in Klue supply chain attack
summary: LastPass confirmed a data breach after attackers compromised Klue, a third-party vendor, accessing customer account metadata.

title: Aztec Tells V4 Users to Withdraw Before June 25 as V5 Upgrade Exposes Security Flaw
summary: Aztec Network warns V4 users to withdraw funds before June 25; V5 upgrade revealed a security vulnerability in the existing bridge contracts.

title: CISA Adds Four Known Exploited Vulnerabilities to Catalog
summary: CISA added four new vulnerabilities to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog, requiring federal agencies to patch by deadline.
